displayNameZh: YouTube 按赞订阅通知动画
summary: Yt Like Subscribe Bell component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「YouTube 按赞订阅通知动画」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-like-subscribe-bell/src/YtLikeSubscribeBell.tsx` and `remotion/yt-like-subscribe-bell/src/runtime-assets.ts` into your Remotion project, import `YtLikeSubscribeBell` and `ytLikeSubscribeBellDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Like Subscribe Bell Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-like-subscribe-bell to my project. Copy both the component file and runtime-assets.ts. Preserve the exported YtLikeSubscribeBellProps API and register the YtLikeSubscribeBell composition with the default props.
